bottomInput.label: Unified input
bottomInput.newDiscussion: Start a new conversation in all cells
bottomInput.placeholder: Press Enter to send to all, Shift+Enter for a new line

picker.description: Choose one cell as the summarizer. MultiMind Flow will send the summary instruction to that AI, then that AI will summarize from its current conversation context.

errors.noCandidates: No discussion cells are available for summarization in the current layout.
errors.generateFailed: Could not send the summary instruction. Confirm the summarizer cell is logged in and supports batch sending.

googleLoginBlocked.label: Login restricted
googleLoginBlocked.message: Google account login is restricted in embedded browsers. Use email/password login for this site if it supports that option.

injectFailed.label: Manual send needed
injectFailed.message: Automatic sending did not complete. Check login state or send manually.

loadFailed.label: Access notice
loadFailed.message: This site is currently unavailable. Please check URL or try again later.

loadTimeout.label: Loading slowly
loadTimeout.message: This site is taking a long time to load and may have network issues.

conversationTruncated.label: Content truncated
conversationTruncated.message: The forwarded content was long, so only the most recent conversation was kept. Earlier content was not included.

riskySites.geminiGoogleLogin: This site only supports Google account login. Google restricts login in embedded browsers, so it may not work properly.
